description_long: This object is a pump-action shotgun with a matte black and dark gray finish, featuring a synthetic collapsible stock and a pistol grip for enhanced control. The receiver and barrel are constructed from metal, while the fore-end and stock are made from polymer materials. The shotgun has a tubular magazine located beneath the barrel, and the fore-end is ribbed for improved grip during operation. There is a visible orange marking on the fore-end, likely for safety or identification purposes. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on functionality, making it suitable for urban law enforcement or civilian defense scenarios.
description: A pump-action shotgun with a collapsible stock, pistol grip, and tubular magazine, finished in matte black and gray with an orange accent on the fore-end.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, including the collapsible stock, pistol grip, and ribbed fore-end with an orange marking.
description_view_1: Narrow end-on view highlighting the slim profile of the barrel and the alignment of the stock and receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the shotgun's length, stock, and fore-end, with the orange marking visible on the tubular magazine.
description_view_3: End-on view from the stock side, emphasizing the width of the stock and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
